use_cases: Setting recurring schedules for task management and reminders
Configuring availability windows in appointment booking systems
Choosing delivery or service frequency in e-commerce checkout flows
Defining business hours or operation schedules
Setting up recurring billing or subscription cycles
ai_summary: A day picker and frequency selector component featuring animated transitions, blur effects, and a smooth spring-based layout system. Supports selection of days of the week combined with frequency options (Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Yearly). Built with motion/react for fluid animations and Tailwind for styling. Ideal for scheduling interfaces, calendar apps, and any UI requiring time-based recurrence configuration.
